mapper.sql: p.id, p.slug, p.frontend_id, p.title, p.title_cn, p.difficulty, COALESCE(array_to_string(p.tags, E'\n'), '') AS tags_text, p.content_markdown, p.leetcode_url, p.sample_test_case, p.python3_template, p.source_commit

where.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM problem_category_item pci JOIN problem_category pc ON pc.id = pci.category_id WHERE pci.problem_id = p.id AND (pc.slug = #{category} OR pc.name = #{category}) )

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM problem p
ORDER BY p.frontend_id DESC NULLS LAST, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.title ASC, p.frontend_id ASC NULLS LAST, p.id ASC
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.frontend_id ASC NULLS LAST, p.id ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT p.difficulty AS value, COUNT(*) AS problem_count FROM problem p WHERE p.difficulty IS NOT NULL AND p.difficulty != '' GROUP BY p.difficulty ORDER BY p.difficulty ASC
SELECT t.tag AS value, COUNT(*) AS problem_count FROM problem p CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(p.tags) AS t(tag) WHERE t.tag IS NOT NULL AND t.tag != '' GROUP BY t.tag ORDER BY t.tag ASC

SELECT pc.slug, pc.name, COUNT(pci.problem_id) AS problem_count FROM problem_category pc LEFT JOIN problem_category_item pci ON pci.category_id = pc.id GROUP BY pc.id, pc.slug, pc.name ORDER BY pc.name ASC, pc.slug ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem ( slug, frontend_id, title, title_cn, difficulty, tags, content_markdown, leetcode_url, sample_test_case, python3_template, source_commit, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{slug}, #{frontendId}, #{title}, #{titleCn}, #{difficulty}, #{tags}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{leetcodeUrl}, #{sampleTestCase}, #{python3Template}, #{sourceCommit}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE SET frontend_id = EXCLUDED.frontend_id, title = EXCLUDED.title, title_cn = EXCLUDED.title_cn, difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty, tags = EXCLUDED.tags, content_markdown = EXCLUDED.content_markdown, leetcode_url = EXCLUDED.leetcode_url, sample_test_case = EXCLUDED.sample_test_case, python3_template = EXCLUDED.python3_template, source_commit = EXCLUDED.source_commit, updated_at = NOW()
